# @json-express/logger-console — AI Context

Zero-dependency default logger (part of `@json-express/boot`). Structured single-line output with automatic per-request `traceId` correlation.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/logger-console
```
Discovery is automatic. **Never import or register it.**

## Configuration
No `jex.*` keys. Diagnostic env var: `JEX_DEBUG_CONTEXT=1` warns when a log line lost its request context.

## What it unlocks
- Every request/DB/middleware log line carries the same `traceId` (AsyncLocalStorage) — grep one id to see a request end-to-end.
- Swap to `logger-pino` for JSON logs, levels, and file output — no other change.
